_comment: account-manager is the CRM spoke for brand account health and renewal signals.
description: Brand account health check, renewal signal scan, and follow-up recommendations.

steps.condition: the caller has a loose phrase, not an exact account_id; read-only; resolves to one account_id or surfaces candidates for the human

note: All data comes from pipeline/accounts/ and pipeline/deals/. No record is written without going through stage-transition rules in pipeline-engine.md.
